zh-CN.name: 小蛇
zh-CN.intro: 小蛇是一种身体长长的动物，身上有滑滑的鳞片。小蛇没有腿，喜欢在草地和树林里爬来爬去。

story.title: 🐍小蛇丝丝找朋友
story.body: 小蛇丝丝住在绿绿的草丛里。一天，它想找一个好朋友一起玩。丝丝轻轻地爬呀爬，看见一只小兔子在吃胡萝卜。丝丝友好地摇摇尾巴，可是小兔子吓了一跳，跳走了。丝丝有点难过，继续往前爬。它又遇见一只小麻雀，小麻雀在树上唱歌。丝丝抬起头，轻声说：“你好。”小麻雀看了看它，飞走了。丝丝想：为什么大家都不和我玩呢？这时候，一只小乌龟慢慢爬过来，说：“我愿意和你做朋友。”丝丝开心极了！它们一起在阳光下爬来爬去，玩得真高兴。

knowledge.title: 小蛇怎么走路？
knowledge.body: 小蛇没有腿，它用身体扭来扭去向前爬。小蛇的鳞片能帮助它在草地上滑行。有的小蛇还会爬树和游泳呢。

en.name: Snake
en.intro: A snake is a long animal with smooth scales. It has no legs and likes to crawl in the grass and forest.

story.title: 🐍Little Snake Sisi Looks for a Friend
story.body: Little snake Sisi lived in the green grass. One day, she wanted to find a friend to play with. Sisi crawled softly and saw a little rabbit eating a carrot. She wagged her tail in a friendly way, but the rabbit was scared and hopped away. Sisi felt a little sad and kept crawling. Then she met a little bird singing in a tree. Sisi looked up and whispered, “Hello.” The bird looked at her and flew away. Sisi thought, “Why doesn’t anyone want to play with me?” Just then, a little turtle crawled slowly over and said, “I’d like to be your friend.” Sisi was so happy! They crawled together under the warm sun and had a wonderful time.

knowledge.title: How do snakes move?
knowledge.body: Snakes have no legs. They wiggle their bodies to crawl forward. Their scales help them slide on the grass. Some snakes can also climb trees and swim.
